title: Connected Chains - Mod Compat
description: An compatibility addon for the Connected Chains Resource Pack that makes chains longer to let them connect to non-full blocks
body:
With this Resource Pack your modded chains will better connect to non-full blocks and allow you to create more interesting and realistic builds using chains.

**Using the pack your chains will connect to things such as:**

- Walls and fences
- Chains facing other directions
- Flower pots
- Mob heads
- And more

**Current Mod Support:**
- Golden and Copper Chains (Macaw's Lights)

Also let me know in the comments on curseforge if there are other mods that add chains as well so I can add to the compatibility 

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/connected-chains-macaws-lights-compat

(specifically for chains that are cross shaped like the vanilla ones)
